sections.paragraph: m. pl., only found Jud. 5:21 , נַחַל קְדוּמִים either stream of antiquity (celebrated of old), so the LXX., Vatic. χειμάῤῥους ἀρχαίων; Targ. the river in which from of old were signs and mighty deeds done for Israel;-or else, stream of battles, i.e. strong, fierce ally of Israel in battle. Comp. קִדֵּם No. 3, and Arab. قَدَمَ to be strong, fierce.
